assertion_results.text: Documentation includes a dedicated Error Responses section explaining the standard error format
assertion_results.evidence: Comprehensive Error Response Format section with schema, field descriptions, and complete error code reference

assertion_results.text: The standard error response schema is documented with fields: code, message, and details
assertion_results.evidence: All three fields documented with types and examples including nested details structure

assertion_results.text: Each endpoint documents all possible error status codes (400, 404, 409, 422, 429, 500)
assertion_results.evidence: All endpoints now include complete error tables. Rate limit (429) and server error (500) included on every endpoint. Custom error classes mapped correctly.

assertion_results.text: Validation errors (400/422) include details about which fields failed and why
assertion_results.evidence: Validation error examples show field-level errors with Zod messages and constraint details

assertion_results.text: Custom error classes (NotFoundError, ConflictError) are mapped to their HTTP status codes
assertion_results.evidence: Complete mapping: ValidationError->422, NotFoundError->404, ConflictError->409, RateLimitError->429, UnauthorizedError->401, ForbiddenError->403, AppError->varies

assertion_results.text: Zod schema validation rules are reflected in parameter constraints (min, max, regex, enum)
assertion_results.evidence: All Zod constraints reflected: name min 2/max 200, sku regex pattern, price positive/max, category enum, stock_quantity min 0, tags max 20 items

assertion_results.text: At least one error response example is shown per endpoint with realistic error data
assertion_results.evidence: Every endpoint has at least one error response JSON example with realistic data including field-specific validation errors

assertion_results.text: The OpenAPI spec includes error response schemas in the components section
assertion_results.evidence: components.schemas.ErrorResponse with code/message/details, components.responses for all error types with $ref to ErrorResponse
